item.title: The Doorbell Footage That Made the Nancy Guthrie Case Even Stranger
item.description: Stephanie Soo discusses doorbell footage tied to the Nancy Guthrie case and why it raised more questions.

media:content.media:title: The Doorbell Footage That Made the Nancy Guthrie Case Even Stranger
media:content.media:description: Stephanie Soo discusses doorbell footage tied to the Nancy Guthrie case and why it raised more questions.

item.title: Japanese Hostess Himeka Faces Claims Of Persona Fraud
item.description: Stephanie Soo explores a story about a highly admired woman in Japan and a possible scam connection.

media:content.media:title: Japanese Hostess Himeka Faces Claims Of Persona Fraud
media:content.media:description: Stephanie Soo explores a story about a highly admired woman in Japan and a possible scam connection.
